Four scattering samples of high-purity aluminum metal,
with masses of 29.4, 49.4, 51.9, and 117.6 g, were
used. The 49.4-g sample was a rectangular polyhedron
while the other three samples were solid cylinders.

Total rms error (for most neutron energies)
is ~10%. The principal sources of experimental error
in the cross section ratios are:
Gamma-ray absorption in the Al samples (3%),
Neutron absorption in the Al samples (2%),
Neutron multiple scattering in the Al (3%),
